systems.name: opencode session subsystem
systems.description: Per-session state, runloop, LLM streaming, compaction

containers.name: opencode daemon (bun)
containers.description: Single long-running process serving sessions over Unix socket

containers.name: Storage layer
containers.description: Persists per-session structured data; survives daemon restart

containers.name: Session message stream
containers.description: Authoritative chronological record of user/assistant/tool messages and parts

components.name: Memory
components.description: Per-session memory artifact: TurnSummary[], FileEntry[], ActionEntry[], lastCompactedAt. Single Storage path. Two render functions (renderForLLM, renderForHuman). DD-4, DD-5.
responsibilities: Track auxiliary file/action metadata (auxiliary, not primary)
Persist to session_memory/<sid> Storage key (single path)
Read with fallback to legacy SharedContext + checkpoint per DD-3
Render two forms: renderForLLM (compact, provider-agnostic) and renderForHuman (timeline)

components.name: Anchor
components.description: Compaction boundary marker in the session message stream. Single representation: assistant message with summary:true + part of type 'compaction'. Read by filterCompacted to truncate history. DD-8.
responsibilities: Carry providerId/modelID/accountId of the time of compaction (used for state-driven rebind detection)
Carry kind metadata (which compaction kind produced this anchor)

components.name: Cooldown
components.description: Throttles repeated compaction within a window. Source-of-truth: Memory.lastCompactedAt (DD-7). Provides shouldThrottle(sid, currentRound, threshold).
responsibilities: Return true if currentRound - lastCompactedRound < threshold
Default threshold: 4 rounds (preserved from existing REBIND_COOLDOWN_ROUNDS)

components.name: SessionCompaction.run
components.description: Single entry point for every compaction execution. Walks KIND_CHAIN table indexed by observed. Routes to one of four executors. DD-9.
responsibilities: Walk kinds in priority order, attempting each
On first success: write Anchor, optionally inject synthetic Continue per INJECT_CONTINUE table
Emit log.info on every kind transition (fail-loud per AGENTS.md rule 1)

components.name: Narrative executor
components.description: Executes the free-narrative kind: takes Memory.renderForLLM output and writes it as Anchor.summaryText. Zero API cost.
responsibilities: Check budget: text token estimate ≤ 30% of model.limit.context

components.name: Schema executor
components.description: Executes the free-schema kind: takes legacy SharedContext.snapshot output. Used only when narrative is empty (e.g. first turn of session). Zero API cost.

components.name: Replay-tail executor
components.description: Executes the free-replay-tail kind: serializes the last N raw rounds as Anchor.summaryText. Used when narrative+schema empty AND raw tail still readable.
responsibilities: Read last N rounds from message stream

components.name: Low-cost-server executor
components.description: Executes the low-cost-server kind: invokes plugin's session.compact hook (codex/openai /responses/compact). Counts toward 5h burst quota but cheaper than LLM agent. Provider-specific format — only used when next call is to the same provider.
responsibilities: Build conversation items from message stream
If plugin returns compactedItems, write Anchor with kind='low-cost-server' and persist opaqueItems

components.name: LLM-agent executor
components.description: Executes the LLM-agent kind: full LLM round with the compaction agent's custom prompt template. Most expensive. Final fallback.
responsibilities: Build compaction prompt with default template

components.name: Runloop state evaluator
components.description: Each runloop iteration calls this; it reads observable session state and returns Optional<Observed> to feed into SessionCompaction.run. State-driven; sets no flags. DD-1.
responsibilities: Return Observed enum value or null

components.name: TurnSummary capture
components.description: At runloop exit, append a TurnSummary to Memory using lastAssistant's final text. DD-2. Mid-run not captured.
responsibilities: Memory.appendTurnSummary({turnIndex, userMessageId, text, modelID, providerId, accountId, endedAt})

relationships.description: calls run() with derived observed condition

removed.name: pendingRebindCompaction
removed.reason: DD-1 — Schedule concept eliminated; state-driven evaluation replaces flag

removed.name: rebind-checkpoint disk file
removed.reason: DD-8 — unified into Anchor in message stream
